title: liatris gracilis var. gracilis
intro: Liatris gracilis var. gracilis, also known as the narrow bluestem or narrow purple bluestem, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its delicate purple flowers and slender foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Liatris gracilis var. gracilis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties to the skin.
